uk: 🕁 Непорочне Зачаття Пресвятої Богородиці св. Анною.
saints.en: Immaculate Conception of the Most Holy Theotokos by St. Anna

rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» – 8 стихир свята, Слава, І нині: свята. Вхід. Прокімен дня. Три читання свята: Бут. 3:1-15, Юд. 13:4-20, Ест. 7: 1-10. На литії всі стихири – свята. На стиховні: стихири свята. На благословенні хлібів: тропар свята (3). Відпуст великий з помин. свята.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар свята (2), Слава, І нині: свята. Катизми чергові з сідальними свята, полієлей і величання, і пополієлейний сідальний свята. Степенна 4-го гласу, 1-й антифон. Прокімен і євангелія свята. Єв. – Лк. 4 зач.; 1:39-49,56. Псалом 50. Стихира свята. Канони два свята. Катавасія чергова – «Христос народжується». По 3-ій пісні – сідальний свята, по 6-ій – кондак-ікос свята. На 9-ій пісні «Чеснішу» не співаємо, але приспіви святкові до ірмосів і тропарів канону. По 9-ій пісні – світильний свята. Хвалитні стихири свята – 4, Слава, І нині: свята. Після великого славослов'я – тропар свята. Відпуст великий з помин. свята.
Часи: на всіх – тропар і кондак свята.
Літургія: антифони повсякденні. Тропар, кондак, прокімен, алилуя, причасний свята. Ап. – Гал. 210 зач.; 4, 22-31. Єв. – Лк. 36 зач.; 8, 16-21. Замість «Достойно» – ірмос 9-ї пісні канону свята з приспівом.

Примітка: Свято Зачаття Пресвятої Богородиці св. Анною згідно з місяцесловами, поданими в книзі Євангелія, Апостола і Часослова, виданих Римською Апостольською столицею для УГКЦ у ХХ ст. (т. зв. recentio ruthena), обмежується одним днем і не має ні передсвяття, ні посвяття.

troparion_en.text: Today the bonds of childlessness are loosed, /  for having heard Joachim and Anna,  / God clearly assures them of the birth of the Mother of God,  / from whom He Himself, the Uncircumscribed One, was born,  / becoming man when He commanded the Angel to cry out: /  “Hail, full of grace,  / the Lord is with you.”

kontakion_en.text:
(Podoben: “You appeared today...”)
Today, the inhabited earth celebrates Anna's conception, which was from God,  / for she gave birth to her who, beyond understanding,1 gave birth to the Word.

matched_oca_saint: Conception of the Most Holy Theotokos by Saint Anna

oca_saints.name: Conception of the Most Holy Theotokos by Saint Anna

troparion.text: Today the bonds of childlessness are loosed, /  for having heard Joachim and Anna,  / God clearly assures them of the birth of the Mother of God,  / from whom He Himself, the Uncircumscribed One, was born,  / becoming man when He commanded the Angel to cry out: /  “Hail, full of grace,  / the Lord is with you.”

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You appeared today...”)
Today, the inhabited earth celebrates Anna's conception, which was from God,  / for she gave birth to her who, beyond understanding,1 gave birth to the Word.

oca_saints.name: Prophetess Hannah the mother of the Prophet Samuel

troparion.text: We celebrate the memory / of Your prophetess Hannah, O Lord; / through her we entreat You, / save our souls.

kontakion.text: (Podoben: “Today You have shown forth...”)Enlightened by the Spirit, your pure heart became the dwelling place of most splendid prophecy; / for you saw things far off as if they were near.  / Therefore, we honor you, blessed and glorious Prophetess Hannah.

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Sophronius, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: Saint Stephen the “New Light” of Constantinople

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Stephen, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: “Unexpected Joy” Icon of the Mother of God

troparion.text: Today the faithful people celebrate in spirit, glorifying the fervent helper of the Christian race;  / and hastening to her most pure image, let us cry out to her:  / "O most merciful Sovereign Lady Theotokos,  / grant unexpected joy to us who are burdened by sins and many sorrows, and deliver us from all evil;  / entreating your Son, Christ our God, to save our souls."

kontakion.text:
We have no other help, we have no other hope, but you, O Sovereign Lady.  /  Help us, for in you we
hope,  /  and of you we boast, for we are your servants.  /  Let us not be put to shame.

oca_saints.name: Hieromonk Anthimus the Athonite, “Fool for Christ”

troparion.text: In you the image was preserved with exactness, O Father,  / for taking up your cross, you followed after Christ.  / By so doing, you taught us to disregard the flesh, for it passes away,  / but to care instead for the soul, since it is immortal.  / Therefore, most venerable Father Anthimus your spirit rejoices with the Angels.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “Seeking the Highest...”)
Having divinely armed thyself with the purity of thy soul  / and firmly grasping unceasing prayer as a
spear,  / thou, our Father Anthimus, have slain the armies of the demons.  / Therefore, pray unceasingly for us all.
